title: Scenario Harness spec — implementation
Scenario format is YAML at v0.1
Scenario files live under `scenarios/` at the repo root
Scenario file is declarative-loadable without code execution
Malformed scenarios fail with `scenario-load-failure`
Scenario name uniqueness is repository-wide
Suite-load is a discrete discovery + parse + validate phase
Scenario execution order is deterministic byte-lex of `name`
Twin substitution is a handler-config override, not a runtime branch
Twin-binary discovery uses scenario path or PATH prefix
Missing twin binary fails the scenario with `twin-binary-not-found`
Twin parity is the parity surface declared in HC §4.8
Fixture setup precedes orchestration
Each scenario uses an isolated workspace
Each scenario uses an isolated event-log directory
Fixture teardown runs on every terminal path (5-step ordered, idempotent)
Workspace snapshot mechanism (in-place worktree)
Per-suite ephemeral fixture root (operator inspects; not auto-deleted)
Per-scenario synthetic project root (one ephemeral project per scenario)
Harness uses the production orchestrator entry-point
No test-mode branches in production-imported packages
Orchestration internal error fails with `orchestration-internal-error`
Harness reads captured JSONL event log as the assertion surface
Assertion vocabulary at v0.1 is four kinds
Workspace-state predicates inspect the captured snapshot in-place
Assertion failure produces verdict `fail` with `assertion-failed`
Event-log capture failure escalates to `harness-internal-error`
Every scenario declares a wall-clock budget (`timeout_secs` 1..7200)
Timeout exceedance produces verdict `timeout` with `scenario-timeout`
Identical inputs MUST produce identical observable verdicts
Harness MUST NOT depend on external network access
Every scenario declares a cadence tag
Scenarios MAY declare a parameter matrix (cap 1024 cells)
Scenarios run sequentially at MVH
Harness CLI grammar at MVH (`harmonik harness`)
Signal handling and graceful shutdown
ScenarioResult durability and emission
Sensor: no test-mode branches in production code (4-layer corpus grep)
Sensor: workspace state fully reset on teardown (descendant-tree, leases, fds)
Sensor: harness operates only on twin binaries (path-prefix + HC-043 hash)
Sensor: scenarios produce identical observable verdicts on rerun (N≥10 nightly)
Sensor: scenario files are declarative-loadable (suite-load lint with strict YAML)
